personalInfo.name: Naveen Hemanth Kokkonda
personalInfo.title: AI-First Full-Stack Developer
personalInfo.tagline: Building AI-powered applications that solve real business problems
personalInfo.valueProposition: I architect AI-integrated solutions that deliver measurable impact—from 95% accuracy in legal document analysis to 90% relevance scores in knowledge retrieval.
personalInfo.description: AI-First Full-Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience building production applications. Specializing in LLM integration, RAG systems, and scalable web architectures. Oracle-certified Generative AI Professional with 3 live applications serving 100+ users. Passionate about turning complex AI research into simple, elegant solutions that people actually want to use.
personalInfo.philosophy: Good code solves problems. Great code solves problems people didn't even know they had.

hero.name: Naveen Hemanth
hero.tagline: I build AI-powered applications that solve real business problems
hero.description: While others just write code, I architect systems that deliver measurable impact. My production applications are serving 100+ users with 95% accuracy in AI-powered document analysis and knowledge retrieval.
highlights: 📊 3 production applications live
🤖 Oracle-certified AI Professional
⚡ 95% accuracy in document analysis
🌍 Supporting 100+ active users

about.title: The Problem Solver Behind AI-Powered Solutions
about.hook: Picture this: A lawyer spending hours deciphering complex legal documents. A researcher drowning in thousands of pages of research papers. A hiring manager reviewing hundreds of resumes manually. I don't just see these problems—I build solutions.
about.description: I'm an AI-first developer who believes the best technology is invisible. My job isn't just to use AI—it's to make AI work for people. With 2+ years of experience in LLM integration and a track record of 3 production applications, I specialize in turning complex AI capabilities into simple, intuitive solutions.

approach.title: My Approach
points: 🎯 AI Integration Expertise: Specialized in LLMs (Groq, OpenAI) with 2+ years hands-on experience
🚀 Production Mindset: Every project is deployed, used, and continuously improved based on real feedback
💼 Business-Focused: I don't just build features—I solve problems that create real value
🏆 Certified: Oracle Generative AI Professional (2025), recognized for expertise in practical AI applications

personality.title: Beyond the Code
personality.content: When I'm not architecting AI systems, you'll find me exploring the latest research papers, contributing to open-source projects, or mentoring fellow developers. I'm a strong believer in the power of community and knowledge sharing. I also enjoy photography and reading about human psychology—insights that make me a better problem solver and team player.

projects.title: LegalEase - AI Legal Document Simplifier
projects.tagline: Making legal documents accessible to everyone through AI

problem.title: The Challenge
problem.description: Legal professionals and individuals spend 3-5 hours daily deciphering complex legal documents. Language barriers and complex terminology make critical information inaccessible to 75% of people who need it.

solution.title: My Solution
solution.description: Built an AI-powered platform using Groq LLMs that simplifies legal documents in 75+ languages. Implemented privacy-first architecture processing documents in-memory without storage, and designed intelligent prompt engineering for accurate, contextual analysis.
approach: Engineered sophisticated prompt engineering for legal context
Implemented 75+ language support with Groq LLM integration

impact.description: Transformed document analysis from hours to minutes with 95% accuracy
impact.businessValue: Enabled access to legal information for non-experts, reducing barriers and democratizing legal knowledge.

features: AI-powered document analysis with 95% accuracy
Multi-format support (PDF, DOCX, images)
Privacy-first: in-memory processing only
75+ language support including Hindi, Arabic, Chinese
Context-aware simplification maintaining legal meaning
challenges: Handling diverse document formats and structures
learnings: The critical importance of prompt engineering in AI applications
How to balance accuracy with user experience
Privacy-first design patterns for sensitive data
Scaling AI solutions for production use

projects.title: Knora AI - RAG Knowledge Assistant

problem.title: The Challenge
problem.description: Researchers and knowledge workers struggle to extract relevant information from thousands of documents. Traditional search returns exact matches but lacks contextual understanding, leading to 60% of searches being abandoned.
problem.problemScale: Thousands of documents, seconds to find answers

solution.title: My Solution
solution.description: Engineered a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using FAISS vector database and Groq LLMs. Implemented sophisticated chunking algorithm with 200-character overlap, enabling intelligent querying across 9 document types.
approach: Built FAISS vector database for semantic search
Integrated multiple Groq AI models (LLaMA 3.1 70B, Mixtral 8x7B)
Designed relevance scoring system with 90% accuracy

impact.description: Achieved 90% relevance score in document queries, transforming how users interact with knowledge bases
impact.businessValue: Reduced information retrieval time from hours to seconds, with context-aware answers.

features: RAG system supporting 9 document types (PDF, DOCX, Excel)
FAISS vector database for intelligent querying
Sophisticated chunking algorithm with 200-character overlap
Multiple Groq AI models integration (LLaMA 3.1 70B, Mixtral 8x7B)
Real-time relevance scoring and response generation
challenges: Optimizing chunking strategy for maximum relevance
Model selection for different query types
learnings: Deep understanding of RAG architecture and its nuances
The importance of chunking strategy in retrieval quality
How to evaluate and improve AI system performance
Trade-offs between speed and accuracy in AI systems

projects.title: ATS-V3 - AI-Powered Resume Analyzer
projects.tagline: Automating hiring decisions with 70% time reduction

problem.title: The Challenge
problem.description: Hiring managers and recruiters spend 70% of their time on initial resume screening. Manual review of hundreds of resumes leads to fatigue, bias, and inconsistent evaluation, with qualified candidates often overlooked.

solution.title: My Solution
solution.description: Developed a Flask-based AI resume analysis application using Groq AI for compatibility scoring. Built complete RESTful API for PDF text extraction and automated candidate screening with 70% time reduction.
approach: Implemented PDF text extraction with PyPDF2
Built AI-powered compatibility scoring with Groq LLM

impact.description: Reduced initial resume screening time by 70%, enabling recruiters to focus on qualified candidates
impact.businessValue: Enabled faster hiring decisions and improved candidate experience through consistent, unbiased evaluation.

features: Complete RESTful API for PDF text extraction
AI compatibility scoring using Groq LLM
Responsive Bootstrap 5 frontend
Production-ready deployment with 4-worker Gunicorn
Historical analysis and scoring retrieval
challenges: Ensuring consistent AI scoring across diverse resume formats
Designing intuitive UI for complex scoring data
learnings: User experience design for B2B applications

projects.title: Smart Notes Organizer
projects.tagline: OCR + AI for intelligent note generation

problem.title: The Challenge
problem.description: Students and professionals capture information in images (whiteboards, documents, presentations) but struggle to organize and search through this visual data. Manual transcription is time-consuming and inefficient.

solution.title: My Solution
solution.description: Built a full-stack MERN application combining OCR (Tesseract.js) and AI (Groq SDK) to extract text from images and generate organized, searchable notes.
approach: Implemented OCR with Tesseract.js for text extraction
Integrated Groq SDK for AI-powered note generation
Built MongoDB backend with Mongoose ODM
Created React frontend with modern UI/UX

impact.description: Transformed visual information into searchable, organized notes with 95% OCR accuracy
impact.businessValue: Saved users hours of manual transcription, enabling focus on learning and application.

features: Image upload with OCR text extraction (95% accuracy)
AI-powered note generation from extracted text
Complete CRUD operations for note management
Modern, responsive UI with Tailwind CSS
Secure file handling with environment-based config
challenges: Optimizing OCR accuracy across different image qualities
Managing AI API rate limits and costs
learnings: User authentication and security best practices

achievements.title: From Hackathon to Production Success
achievements.subtitle: Building LegalEase
achievements.story: What started as a 48-hour hackathon challenge became a production application serving 100+ users. LegalEase taught me that great ideas are just the beginning—execution, iteration, and user feedback are what make them transformative.
keyLearnings: Validated product-market fit through rapid iteration and user feedback
The critical importance of privacy-first architecture for sensitive data
How to scale from prototype to production with real users
The value of persistence and continuous improvement

achievements.title: Mastering Advanced RAG Architecture
achievements.subtitle: Engineering Knora AI
achievements.story: Building Knora AI's RAG system was my deep dive into vector databases and AI retrieval. The challenge wasn't just implementing RAG—it's making it work reliably across 9 document types with 90% relevance scores. This project solidified my understanding of AI system design.
keyLearnings: Technical depth matters: understanding the 'why' behind algorithms
The importance of proper chunking strategy in retrieval quality
How to evaluate and improve AI system performance empirically
Trade-offs between speed and accuracy in real-time AI systems

achievements.title: Oracle AI Professional Certification
achievements.subtitle: Formalizing AI Expertise
achievements.story: Earning the Oracle Generative AI Professional certification wasn't just about getting another credential—it was about validating my practical experience with formal knowledge and learning enterprise-grade AI deployment strategies.
keyLearnings: Enterprise AI deployment has unique challenges beyond prototyping
Cloud infrastructure knowledge is crucial for AI applications
Formal certification validates practical skills to employers
Continuous learning is essential in rapidly evolving AI field
